description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

v1.18.0 New Features
• 「飯能市政」(Hanno City Government) calendar added to daily portal — In addition to the existing 「Myはんのう」(general events for residents), a new 「飯能市政」calendar that consolidates city council schedules, mayor's blog, and city announcements now appears combined in the "Today's Events" section. Default is ON. To turn individual notification feeds on/off, use the "📅 Calendar Sync" settings in daily portal.

v1.18.1 Changes
• Heat index (WBGT) color adjusted toward caution tones — Fixed the issue where "Caution" appeared as yellow-green and looked "Safe". Now follows a gradient: green (mostly safe) → yellow (caution) → orange (alert) → red (severe caution) → dark red (danger).

v1.18.1 Fixes
• Bus page "Ride-share wagon (Odekake Mooma bus)" links broken — Links for each district (Seiho/Kaji, Nakafuji/Nakasawa, Minatakagorome) were not directing to the city hall website correctly and displayed blank pages. Fixed.

v1.18.2 New Features
• URLs in event detail modal text are now clickable links — Tap to jump directly to the relevant page.
• Event "Information Source URL" now displayed — For events where a source URL is specified in the calendar, a clickable "🔗 [URL]" appears in the detail modal.
• Opening in Google Calendar shows "Agenda" view — More readable than the default month view; easier to check upcoming events in chronological order starting from today.

v1.18.2 Fixes
• Fixed issue where the background page would scroll when an event detail modal was open (now only the modal scrolls).
